mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.test_key, t.title, t.description, t.thumbnail_image, t.category, t.estimated_time, t.status, t.created_by, t.created_at, t.updated_at, COUNT(q.id) AS question_count FROM md_tests t LEFT JOIN md_test_questions q ON t.id = q.test_id AND q.is_active = 1 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
SELECT id, test_key, title, description, thumbnail_image, category, estimated_time, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM md_tests WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE md_tests SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage}, category = #{category}, estimated_time = #{estimatedTime}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM md_tests WHERE test_key = #{testKey}
SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(test_key, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM md_tests WHERE test_key LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT id, test_id, question_order, question_text, domain, is_reverse AS `reverse`, is_active AS `active`, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_questions WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY question_order ASC
SELECT id, test_id, question_order, question_text, domain, is_reverse AS `reverse`, is_active AS `active`, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_questions WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE md_test_questions SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM md_test_questions WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_active = 1
SELECT id, test_id, result_title, result_content, result_image, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_results WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY id ASC
